operational_knowledge_units.title: OpenAllChutes API opens all closed chutes
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The OpenAllChutes API opens all closed chutes. The slide indicates it is helpful when a closeout was performed but the sort was not cycled and startup is needed again.
observed_evidence: “This is helpful in the event they did a close out but did not cycle the sort and they want to startup again.”

relationships.target: system startup after closeout without sort cycle

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability: OpenAllChutes opens all closed chutes. Used when closeout was done but the sort was not cycled and the system needs to be started again.

operational_knowledge_units.title: CancelCloseout API cancels closeout exchanges not in process
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The CancelCloseout API cancels all closeout exchanges that are not in process. The slide states it is used when the customer performs a manual bagout.
observed_evidence: “CancelCloseout: Will cancel all close out exchanges that are not in process.”
“Used when the customer does a manual bagout.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability: CancelCloseout cancels all closeout exchanges not currently in process. It is used when the customer performs a manual bagout.

operational_knowledge_units.title: GetAGVFaultStats API returns current AGV fault statistics
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The GetAGVFaultStats API retrieves the current AGV fault statistics.
observed_evidence: “GetAGVFaultStats: Will get the current AGV fault stats.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability: GetAGVFaultStats returns the current AGV fault stats.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System State API returns the current system state
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The System State API retrieves the current state of the system.
observed_evidence: “System State: Will get the current state of the system.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: API capability: System State gets the current state of the system.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Startup API starts the system from shutdown state
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The System Startup API starts the system if it is currently in a shutdown state, indicating a state-dependent startup transition.
observed_evidence: “System Startup: Will startup the system if its in a shutdown state.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: State transition and API capability: System Startup starts the system when the system is in a shutdown state.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Start the system using the System Startup API when in shutdown state
preconditions: System is in a shutdown state.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Bullet list of system APIs including System Startup and System State descriptions.

steps.expected_outcome: The system starts up if it is in a shutdown state.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the system was in shutdown state before issuing the API call and verify that startup occurs.
steps.visual_region_hint: System API bullet list, lower portion of slide

warnings: The slide does not provide API invocation syntax, interface, or post-start verification details.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate: use the System Startup API to start the system when it is in shutdown state. The slide gives only the condition and outcome, not exact call details.
